title: Refined Storage - JEI Integration
description: Refined Storage has an optional integration mod for Just Enough Items (JEI), enhancing crafting and recipe interaction.
body:
Refined Storage has an optional integration mod for Just Enough Items (JEI), enhancing crafting and recipe interaction.

## Recipe transferring in the Crafting Grid

You can transfer recipes from JEI directly into the [Crafting Grid](https://refinedmods.com/refined-storage/viewing-resources/crafting-grid.html).

- Missing ingredients? The transfer will still place what you have.
- If autocrafting is available for missing ingredients, you can start autocrafting tasks from the preview.

![JEI crafting grid transfer](https://refinedmods.com/jei-crafting-grid-transfer.bed892df.png)  
![JEI crafting grid transfer preview](https://refinedmods.com/jei-crafting-grid-transfer-preview.a76766f4.png)

## Recipe transferring in the Pattern Grid

Recipes from JEI can also be transferred into the [Pattern Grid](https://refinedmods.com/refined-storage/autocrafting/pattern-grid.html). The interface will show which ingredients are autocraftable.

## R/U key support

You can use the R and U keys on the [Grid](https://refinedmods.com/refined-storage/viewing-resources/grid.html) and filter slots to view recipes and usages respectively.

## Recipe viewer synchronization

You can sync the search box between JEI and the [Grid](https://refinedmods.com/refined-storage/viewing-resources/grid.html):

- One-way (Grid → JEI)
- Two-way sync

![JEI sync in the Grid](https://refinedmods.com/jei-sync.bc1d0331.png)

## Ghost ingredient dragging

You can drag any type of ingredient from JEI to filter slots in Refined Storage.

![JEI ghost ingredient dragging](https://refinedmods.com/jei-ghost-dragging.66c33644.png)

## Exclusion zones

JEI elements automatically reposition to avoid overlapping Refined Storage GUI components.
